title: Technical Supervisor
description:
Main Duty

Management of Construction operations include site visit and preparation of tenders to customers and responsible for the execution of all construction projects.

Scope of Work

  • Ensure technical relevance, high productivity with respect to HSE principles and policies and economical viability of the operations at all times.
  • Responsible for construction projects.
  • Promote company’s business by conducting work assignments with a positive attitude and professional safe manner.
  • Facilitating and updating the weekly operations meetings.
  • Responsible for updating the GM on jobs progress.
  • Ensure close liaison with customers on all operational and/or technical matters, such activities, namely attending pre-tender site visits, kick-off meetings, establishing detailed work plans & schedules and writing procedures etc. as requested.
  • Ensure adequate back-up & support site teams with performance problems and help establish effective corrective actions.
  • Work closely with subcontractors and customers to identify efficiencies and help implement them.
  • Identify high risk activities or situations that leave VINA exposed to undesired liability (injury, contamination, reputation).
  • Maintain knowledge and understanding of compliance requirements for job site operations.
  • Ensure that all reporting tools and reports are created in a timely and accurate manner.
  • Advisory role to General Manager on proposed investments in solar equipment and other educational programs for personnel.
  • Any other assignment that may be required from time to time.
  • Comply with all company rules, policies, procedures and work instruction as applicable to the duty.

postedCompany.description:
VINA Specialist Pte Ltd is a leader in providing our clients with a wide range of Rope Access services and solutions. We have full-time rope workforce and have the best track records in providing quality rope access services.


Our Rope Access Technicians are IRATA (Industrial Rope Access Trade Association) trained and certified and have undergone specialized training in different aspects. We provide a comprehensive range of services, which consists of Industrial, Commercial, Residential, Engineering, Lightning Protection System (LPS), Heat Shielding, Bird Management, Wind Turbines, CompEX and Rental & Sales. VINA specializes in integrated services with end-to-end access solutions for Marine Offshore, Oil & Gas, Civil Construction and Structural Maintenance Industries.


VINA has recently explored into a new business venture – Solar Management for Industrial / Commercial / Residential.
postedCompany.name: VINA SPECIALIST PTE. LTD.
